nvidia-rtx-4090.name: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 4090
nvidia-rtx-4090.note: Flagship local LLM card. 24GB VRAM runs 70B quantized models.

nvidia-rtx-5090.name: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 5090
nvidia-rtx-5090.note: Next-gen 32GB flagship. Best for large models and inference hosting.

mac-studio-m4-max.name: Mac Studio M4 Max 64GB
mac-studio-m4-max.note: Silent, efficient local inference. Great for developers and content agents.

beelink-gtr9-pro.name: Beelink GTR9 Pro
beelink-gtr9-pro.note: Ryzen AI 9 HX 370 with strong NPU. Good portable AI box.

gmktec-evo-x2.name: GMKtec EVO-X2
gmktec-evo-x2.note: Mini PC with dedicated GPU option for local LLMs.

amd-ryzen-9-7950x3d.name: AMD Ryzen 9 7950X3D
amd-ryzen-9-7950x3d.note: High-core CPU for CPU-fallback inference and data preprocessing.

ddr5-64gb-kit.name: 64GB DDR5-6000 RAM Kit
ddr5-64gb-kit.note: Minimum RAM for serious local LLM builds; 128GB preferred for 70B models.

samsung-990-pro-2tb.name: Samsung 990 Pro 2TB NVMe SSD
samsung-990-pro-2tb.note: Fast storage matters for loading large models and datasets.
